programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: 曼谷風雲
programme.desc: 地下拳手林楓因拒絕替曼谷黑幫打黑拳,因此被追殺。他雖成功逃脫,卻失去記憶。當林楓開展其新生活時,卻被黑幫發現行蹤,並找來絕頂打手對付他。期間林楓忽然回復記憶,並誓要將黑幫殲滅。

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3 #5
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3 #5
programme.desc: 節目將泰國超級巨星、歌手、拳手、模特兒和說唱歌手帶進明星拳擊比賽擂台。第2季特別加入泰國首場女性拳擊賽事,第3季更有兩位奧運金牌選手一起爭奪冠軍寶座。這泰國獨有的明星拳擊比賽節目有華麗的服飾和拳拳到肉..

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: 少年陳真之亂世英雄
programme.desc: 電影講述清末上海的小人物陳真,在經歷苦難及面對無數挑戰後,蛻變成長為民族英雄的故事。

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: 殲毒先鋒
programme.desc: 退役軍人吳巍和臥底刑警高天明帶領特別行動小組勇闖近曼谷的孤島,從暴徒手中救出人質。但在完成任務並準備離島之際,吳巍發現自己的女兒被對方脅持。為救女兒及將犯罪分子繩之以法,吳巍和高天明重回危險境地,與暴..

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack 1 #3
programme.desc: Agonize over a lost Stork pack puppy, and tussle with Manzi pups who are sorting their place in the hierarchy, figuring out noisy-neighbor friends and foes. Hop on a search mission with Julz for the missing Kakuli pack in the desolate Badlands.

programme.title: 野狗: 與族群一起奔跑 #3
programme.desc: 為一隻丟失的鸛群幼崽苦惱,與正在等級戰鬥的曼茲幼崽打成一片,了解吵鬧鄰居中的朋友和敵人。和朱爾茲一起在荒涼的不毛之地尋找失蹤的卡庫裡族群。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #1
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​探索由社區經營的瑞特提大象庇護所,在這裡,人類的代理媽媽們透過玩耍教導小象如何在野外生存,並細心地照顧與陪伴牠們成長。與那隻失去象鼻的小象隆烏洛建立情感連結,同時了解為什麼六歲的小象凱勒勒那場神祕的疾病,可能會讓牠的重返野外之路被迫延遲。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #2
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #2
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​在道別的傷痛與對未來的希望之間尋求平衡,因為這一代被救援的大象,終於迎來了重返自由的時刻。歡迎瑞特提大家庭的新成員: 一頭從水坑中被救出的象寶寶,以及一匹名叫奇希瑪的斑馬,牠曾因創傷而驚恐不安。

programme.title: Airborne 1 #4
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

programme.title: 空中翱翔 #4
programme.desc: 看動物穿越天空展開非凡的旅程。穿梭在木製迷宮中的迅捷蒼鷹,加入沙雞艱辛遠行到遙遠水源的跋涉,並觀賞一群椋鳥形成的壯觀集體盤旋,迷惑牠們的天敵。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 散落在不同海洋上的島嶼,其多樣性超乎想像;演化亦在你眼前發生。從加拉帕戈斯群島走到南極洲,看看海獅、雀鳥、蟋蟀、猴子和其他野生動物,如何以驚人的適應力來應對氣候變化問題。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 從撒哈拉到荒野,於極端環境中學習動物如何適應急速變化的氣候並掙扎求存。與黑猩猩一起在洞穴中避難、看看駱駝以特別技巧飲用鹽水,並傾聽斑胸草雀為蛋寶寶由唱的歌,了解歌聲如何讓幼雛變得細小。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #4 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #4 [英/普]
programme.desc: 前往美國極北地帶,拜訪沿著水道生活的終極格鬥士。春回大地,看到融雪就知道格鬥隨時上演: 鷹與鷺的對決、熊族對陣,以及蜻蜓蛹與大型水蟲之間的決鬥。

programme.title: Survival of the Beast 1 #5 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Peek inside the secret world of the fearless, often misunderstood sloth bear. Travel to Sri Lanka with Max and discover how this fierce, shaggy animal fights off leopards and other deadly rivals, all while trying to secure enough protein to survive.

programme.title: 野獸絕地求生記 #5 [英/普]
programme.desc: 跟隨麥可斯探索斯里蘭卡,窺探懶熊常被誤解的神秘世界。見證這種看似人畜無害、毛髮蓬亂的動物,如何無畏地擊退豹子,並觀察牠們如何努力獲取所需的營養。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #1
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​探索由社區經營的瑞特提大象庇護所,在這裡,人類的代理媽媽們透過玩耍教導小象如何在野外生存,並細心地照顧與陪伴牠們成長。與那隻失去象鼻的小象隆烏洛建立情感連結,同時了解為什麼六歲的小象凱勒勒那場神祕的疾病,可能會讓牠的重返野外之路被迫延遲。

programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​在道別的傷痛與對未來的希望之間尋求平衡,因為這一代被救援的大象,終於迎來了重返自由的時刻。歡迎瑞特提大家庭的新成員: 一頭從水坑中被救出的象寶寶,以及一匹名叫奇希瑪的斑馬,牠曾因創傷而驚恐不安。

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth 1 #6 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: 野外紀事 #6 [英/普]
programme.desc: 於11月見證大自然一些最不可思議的事,從聚在墨西哥森林中的數百萬隻君主斑蝶,到籠罩著杜拜市的濃霧,標誌著冬天的開始。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 散落在不同海洋上的島嶼,其多樣性超乎想像;演化亦在你眼前發生。從加拉帕戈斯群島走到南極洲,看看海獅、雀鳥、蟋蟀、猴子和其他野生動物,如何以驚人的適應力來應對氣候變化問題。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 從撒哈拉到荒野,於極端環境中學習動物如何適應急速變化的氣候並掙扎求存。與黑猩猩一起在洞穴中避難、看看駱駝以特別技巧飲用鹽水,並傾聽斑胸草雀為蛋寶寶由唱的歌,了解歌聲如何讓幼雛變得細小。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #4 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #4 [英/普]
programme.desc: 前往美國極北地帶,拜訪沿著水道生活的終極格鬥士。春回大地,看到融雪就知道格鬥隨時上演: 鷹與鷺的對決、熊族對陣,以及蜻蜓蛹與大型水蟲之間的決鬥。

programme.title: Survival of the Beast 1 #5 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Peek inside the secret world of the fearless, often misunderstood sloth bear. Travel to Sri Lanka with Max and discover how this fierce, shaggy animal fights off leopards and other deadly rivals, all while trying to secure enough protein to survive.

programme.title: 野獸絕地求生記 #5 [英/普]
programme.desc: 跟隨麥可斯探索斯里蘭卡,窺探懶熊常被誤解的神秘世界。見證這種看似人畜無害、毛髮蓬亂的動物,如何無畏地擊退豹子,並觀察牠們如何努力獲取所需的營養。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #1
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​探索由社區經營的瑞特提大象庇護所,在這裡,人類的代理媽媽們透過玩耍教導小象如何在野外生存,並細心地照顧與陪伴牠們成長。與那隻失去象鼻的小象隆烏洛建立情感連結,同時了解為什麼六歲的小象凱勒勒那場神祕的疾病,可能會讓牠的重返野外之路被迫延遲。

programme.title: Shadowlands 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: The south-eastern coast of New Zealand are some of the richest fishing grounds in the world – the place for young marine animals to transition from novices to independent adults. Young whales, dolphins and seals learn to hunt, learn the rules of society,

programme.title: 南荒之地 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 新西蘭東南岸是世上最富饒的漁場之一,也是海洋動物嬰孩從新丁長大成人之地。年輕的鯨魚、海豚和海豹學習捕獵;學習社會規則,甚至開始自己的冒險。

programme.title: Airborne 1 #4
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

programme.title: 空中翱翔 #4
programme.desc: 看動物穿越天空展開非凡的旅程。穿梭在木製迷宮中的迅捷蒼鷹,加入沙雞艱辛遠行到遙遠水源的跋涉,並觀賞一群椋鳥形成的壯觀集體盤旋,迷惑牠們的天敵。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 散落在不同海洋上的島嶼,其多樣性超乎想像;演化亦在你眼前發生。從加拉帕戈斯群島走到南極洲,看看海獅、雀鳥、蟋蟀、猴子和其他野生動物,如何以驚人的適應力來應對氣候變化問題。

programme.title: Survival of the Beast 1 #5 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Peek inside the secret world of the fearless, often misunderstood sloth bear. Travel to Sri Lanka with Max and discover how this fierce, shaggy animal fights off leopards and other deadly rivals, all while trying to secure enough protein to survive.

programme.title: 野獸絕地求生記 #5 [英/普]
programme.desc: 跟隨麥可斯探索斯里蘭卡,窺探懶熊常被誤解的神秘世界。見證這種看似人畜無害、毛髮蓬亂的動物,如何無畏地擊退豹子,並觀察牠們如何努力獲取所需的營養。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #1
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​探索由社區經營的瑞特提大象庇護所,在這裡,人類的代理媽媽們透過玩耍教導小象如何在野外生存,並細心地照顧與陪伴牠們成長。與那隻失去象鼻的小象隆烏洛建立情感連結,同時了解為什麼六歲的小象凱勒勒那場神祕的疾病,可能會讓牠的重返野外之路被迫延遲。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #2
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #2
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​在道別的傷痛與對未來的希望之間尋求平衡,因為這一代被救援的大象,終於迎來了重返自由的時刻。歡迎瑞特提大家庭的新成員: 一頭從水坑中被救出的象寶寶,以及一匹名叫奇希瑪的斑馬,牠曾因創傷而驚恐不安。

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth 1 #6 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: 野外紀事 #6 [英/普]
programme.desc: 於11月見證大自然一些最不可思議的事,從聚在墨西哥森林中的數百萬隻君主斑蝶,到籠罩著杜拜市的濃霧,標誌著冬天的開始。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 散落在不同海洋上的島嶼,其多樣性超乎想像;演化亦在你眼前發生。從加拉帕戈斯群島走到南極洲,看看海獅、雀鳥、蟋蟀、猴子和其他野生動物,如何以驚人的適應力來應對氣候變化問題。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 從撒哈拉到荒野,於極端環境中學習動物如何適應急速變化的氣候並掙扎求存。與黑猩猩一起在洞穴中避難、看看駱駝以特別技巧飲用鹽水,並傾聽斑胸草雀為蛋寶寶由唱的歌,了解歌聲如何讓幼雛變得細小。

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack 1 #4
programme.desc: Dodge a leopard with the Manzi dogs while they treat themselves to a stolen feast. No such luck for the Kakuli pack on the hunt, as they’re foiled by a brave puku antelope. Find the stork pack, and retreat from charging elephants with Jules and Simon.

programme.title: 野狗: 與族群一起奔跑 #4
programme.desc: 在享受偷來的盛宴時,躲避了一隻獵豹和曼茲狗群。但卡庫裡族群在狩獵中就沒這麼幸運了,因為它們被一隻勇敢的普庫羚羊挫敗了。找到鸛群,和朱爾斯和西蒙一起逃避衝鋒中的大象。

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands 1 #1 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Endure winter and early spring on the west coast, where animals eke out a chilly existence. Watch red deer battle on windswept Inishvickillane, welcome seal pups amid howling storms on the Inishkea islands, and view the return of the basking sharks.

programme.title: 愛爾蘭: 野性島嶼 #1 [英/普]
programme.desc: 見證棲身於西海岸的不同物種,如何忍受嚴冬並迎接初春的來臨。親眼目睹在強風下的紅鹿激戰,在風聲呼嘯的暴風雨中歡迎海豹寶寶來臨,以及象鯊群的回歸。

programme.title: Wild Latin America 1 #1
programme.desc: Follow the first months of a newborn humpback whale’s life in the waters off the Pacific Coast of Columbia. See how his mother nurtures him through sickness, supports his body, protects him under attack, and prepares him for an epic journey.

programme.title: 拉丁美生态奥秘 #1
programme.desc: 哥倫比亞海岸附近,新生的座頭鯨吸了牠的第一口氣。牠身長16呎,是一個巨人,但未來的挑戰跟牠一樣巨大。在進行地球上最長的遷徙之一前,牠必須快點長大。

programme.title: Wild Latin America 1 #2
programme.desc: Travel deep into the Columbian rainforest, where it’s mating season for one of the most clever monkey species in the world. Witness the most important time of year for male squirrel monkeys that have been bulking up to impress females for months.

programme.title: 拉丁美生态奥秘 #2
programme.desc: 隨著松鼠猴的繁殖季節臨近,女強人艾巴必須帶領牠的團伙尋找食物,但男領袖撒母耳能奪得芳心嗎?年輕的沙奇拿迷了路,而敵人逐漸緊逼,局勢開始緊張。

programme.title: Wild Latin America 1 #3
programme.desc: Get to know South America’s only bear species. Witness the shy and charismatic spectacled bear play, forage, and look for mates at the secluded Chaparri Ecological Reserve in Northern Peru.

programme.title: 拉丁美生态奥秘 #3
programme.desc: 在秘魯的山脈,一小群眼鏡熊為生存而戰。孤兒阿馬遜娜必須學會獨立。老去的東哥沒時間找到配偶,很難才能俘虜理想對象曹莉達。

programme.title: Supersenses 1 #1 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Vision – it’s how ninety-five percent of animals interpret the world. Every species on Earth is a chapter in the fascinating story of sight. This episode follows that story from blurry beginnigs to mind-blowing hexnocular vision.

programme.title: 動物超感官 第一季 #1 [英/普]
programme.desc: 視野對生存尤關重要。這是百分之九十五的動物瞭解世界的方法。眼睛是如此重要,從難以置信地簡單到令人費解地複雜,它們已經獨立地進化了近百次。

programme.title: Supersenses 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: See the animals that push the limits of physics, chemistry and engineering to pull off feats that humans can only dream of, and find out how evolution granted them with such amazing abilities. Sometimes it takes a super-power just to survive.

programme.title: 動物超感官 第一季 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 看看那些突破物理、化學和工程極限的動物,牠們實現人類夢想中的能力,並找出進化如何賦予牠們如此驚人的能力。有時生存只能依靠超能力。

programme.title: Supersenses 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Dive into a dazzling world beyond human perception, where animals use their super senses to detect light we can’t see, sound we can’t hear and even stranger forces we can’t begin to detect.

programme.title: 動物超感官 第一季 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 潛入人類感知以外令人眼花繚亂的世界,動物利用牠們的超感官來感測我們看不到的光、聽不到的聲音,甚至是我們無法察覺的陌生力量。

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: 啄木鳥: 樹洞故事
programme.desc: 伴隨著一個獨特的鳥類家族的穩定鼓點行進。了解為何世界上從大到小的239種啄木鳥都是自然界最好的伐木工;探索牠們的飛行、攀爬和呼叫技能;進入牠們的秘密巢穴一探究竟。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #1 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #1 [英/普]
programme.desc: 見證鬥士們如何在非洲大草原的旱季中爭奪水源和其他珍貴資源。親眼目擊獅子和大象為爭奪地盤的激烈爭鬥、螞蟻襲擊白蟻丘、以及蜜獾與毒蛇聯袂上演的危險探戈。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Go up against Australia’s wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals. Learn if these weapons, such as the kangaroo’s deadly boxing moves and the redback spider’s precision-engineered traps, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 拜訪澳洲最狡猾的鬥士和他們驚人的武器庫。從袋鼠的致命拳擊和紅背蜘蛛精密設計的陷阱,暸解他們如何運用這些必殺技擊退敵人,同時應對氣候變化的侵害。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Cheer as young gladiators earn their stripes in the dense tropical forests of the Americas. Stand back as a poison dart frog launches a toxic barrage, observe a jaguar-caiman turf war, and see a hungry coati cross paths with a defensive tarantula.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 齊來為年輕的格鬥士們鼓掌,並親眼見證他們在美洲茂密的熱帶森林中奮力拼搏!然後退後一步,觀察一隻毒箭蛙發動絕活攻勢、還有美洲豹和凱門鱷爭奪地盤,以及見證一隻飢餓的長鼻狸與猛蜘蛛的邂逅。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #4 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #4 [英/普]
programme.desc: 前往美國極北地帶,拜訪沿著水道生活的終極格鬥士。春回大地,看到融雪就知道格鬥隨時上演: 鷹與鷺的對決、熊族對陣,以及蜻蜓蛹與大型水蟲之間的決鬥。

programme.title: Snow Leopards with Dan ONeill 1 #1
programme.desc: Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded. Watch him battle hostile landscapes and uncertainty as he sheds light on the challenges that The Dude and other snow leopards face.

programme.title: 雪豹獵奇 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​與丹一同踏上旅程,穿越嚴酷無情的蒙古荒野,只為尋找那隻史上有紀錄以來體型最大的雪豹: 「老兄」(The Dude)。目睹他如何在充滿敵意、危機四伏的地形與環境中奮力前行,並在未知與不確定中披荊斬棘,同時揭示「老兄」以及其他雪豹在生存上所面臨的艱難挑戰與嚴峻現實。

programme.title: Snow Leopards with Dan ONeill 1 #2
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: 雪豹獵奇 #2
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​跟隨丹與他的團隊,一同在「老兄」的領地中嗅探、追蹤,他們懷疑雌性雪豹在雪豹族群中的角色,可能遠比先前想像的更加關鍵、更具影響力。當丹意外發現一群雪豹聚集的反常現象時,對雪豹行為的既有研究與認知也因此受到衝擊與挑戰。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #1
programme.desc: Head out into the Pantanal with Lizzie and the Onçafari team on the hunt for a missing dominant male jaguar. Monitor the battle between young hopefuls, like outsider Badalo, who want to usurp his power and win over Fera and the other local females.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #1
programme.desc: 跟隨麗茲·戴利及其團隊前往潘塔納爾,追尋一隻失蹤的雄性美洲豹領袖,並親眼目睹年輕挑戰者之間的戰鬥。見證局外人巴達洛如何篡奪權力,並贏得菲拉和其他雌性美洲豹的歡心。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #2
programme.desc: Get to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner. Then learn why Ferinha, another local female, struggles with motherhood as more males move in and threaten the youngsters.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #2
programme.desc: 一起拜會潘塔納爾美洲豹族群的女王菲拉,從旁觀察她教導淘氣的幼寶寶辛巴如何爬樹和捕獵。然後看看另一隻雌豹菲琳娜如何面對更多當地雄豹入侵領土,並威脅幼寶寶的存活。面對考驗,她必須為母職掙扎堅持。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #3
programme.desc: Rejoin the team for some post-rainy-season drama as they search for Ferinha, Fera, and Badalo, whose tracking collars are missing. Meet a new biologist who helps Lizzie recollar the jaguars, adding a high-tech device that will record even more data.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #3
programme.desc: 跟隨科學家團隊在雨季過後重新走入美洲豹領地,進行一次具規模的搜索,以尋找菲琳娜、菲拉和巴達洛,因為他們的追蹤項圈已經丟失。迎接一位生物學家加入團隊,在他的協助下,麗茲·戴利為美洲豹重新安裝追蹤項圈,並添置高科技設備以記錄更多數據。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #4
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #4
programme.desc: 經歷風暴、洪水和停電,莉茲和獸醫霍亞雷斯仍奮力為更多美洲豹戴上項圈,情勢相當緊張。一起尋找巴達洛的下落,並嘗試在追蹤標籤掉落之前找到他,以及拜訪一隻團隊渴望研究的新䧳豹。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #5
programme.desc: Watch the Onçafari team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, and take a peek at Aurora’s cub, Apolo. Continue to track Badalo, who has moved deeper into the flooded forest, where he puts Lizzie’s game-changing research in jeopardy.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #5
programme.desc: 見證奧瑪法瑞團隊為新認識的䧳豹阿羅艾拉戴上項圈,並一瞥她的豹寶寶阿波羅。繼續追查巴達洛的落下,他似乎已深入森林;他的失蹤可能讓莉茲的突破性研究毀於一旦!

programme.title: Snow Leopards with Dan ONeill 1 #1
programme.desc: Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded. Watch him battle hostile landscapes and uncertainty as he sheds light on the challenges that The Dude and other snow leopards face.

programme.title: 雪豹獵奇 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​與丹一同踏上旅程,穿越嚴酷無情的蒙古荒野,只為尋找那隻史上有紀錄以來體型最大的雪豹: 「老兄」(The Dude)。目睹他如何在充滿敵意、危機四伏的地形與環境中奮力前行,並在未知與不確定中披荊斬棘,同時揭示「老兄」以及其他雪豹在生存上所面臨的艱難挑戰與嚴峻現實。

programme.title: Snow Leopards with Dan ONeill 1 #2
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: 雪豹獵奇 #2
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​跟隨丹與他的團隊,一同在「老兄」的領地中嗅探、追蹤,他們懷疑雌性雪豹在雪豹族群中的角色,可能遠比先前想像的更加關鍵、更具影響力。當丹意外發現一群雪豹聚集的反常現象時,對雪豹行為的既有研究與認知也因此受到衝擊與挑戰。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #1
programme.desc: Head out into the Pantanal with Lizzie and the Onçafari team on the hunt for a missing dominant male jaguar. Monitor the battle between young hopefuls, like outsider Badalo, who want to usurp his power and win over Fera and the other local females.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #1
programme.desc: 跟隨麗茲·戴利及其團隊前往潘塔納爾,追尋一隻失蹤的雄性美洲豹領袖,並親眼目睹年輕挑戰者之間的戰鬥。見證局外人巴達洛如何篡奪權力,並贏得菲拉和其他雌性美洲豹的歡心。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #2
programme.desc: Get to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner. Then learn why Ferinha, another local female, struggles with motherhood as more males move in and threaten the youngsters.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #2
programme.desc: 一起拜會潘塔納爾美洲豹族群的女王菲拉,從旁觀察她教導淘氣的幼寶寶辛巴如何爬樹和捕獵。然後看看另一隻雌豹菲琳娜如何面對更多當地雄豹入侵領土,並威脅幼寶寶的存活。面對考驗,她必須為母職掙扎堅持。

programme.desc: Rejoin the team for some post-rainy-season drama as they search for Ferinha, Fera, and Badalo, whose tracking collars are missing. Meet a new biologist who helps Lizzie recollar the jaguars, adding a high-tech device that will record even more data.

programme.desc: 跟隨科學家團隊在雨季過後重新走入美洲豹領地,進行一次具規模的搜索,以尋找菲琳娜、菲拉和巴達洛,因為他們的追蹤項圈已經丟失。迎接一位生物學家加入團隊,在他的協助下,麗茲·戴利為美洲豹重新安裝追蹤項圈,並添置高科技設備以記錄更多數據。

programme.desc: 經歷風暴、洪水和停電,莉茲和獸醫霍亞雷斯仍奮力為更多美洲豹戴上項圈,情勢相當緊張。一起尋找巴達洛的下落,並嘗試在追蹤標籤掉落之前找到他,以及拜訪一隻團隊渴望研究的新䧳豹。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #5
programme.desc: Watch the Onçafari team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, and take a peek at Aurora’s cub, Apolo. Continue to track Badalo, who has moved deeper into the flooded forest, where he puts Lizzie’s game-changing research in jeopardy.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #5
programme.desc: 見證奧瑪法瑞團隊為新認識的䧳豹阿羅艾拉戴上項圈,並一瞥她的豹寶寶阿波羅。繼續追查巴達洛的落下,他似乎已深入森林;他的失蹤可能讓莉茲的突破性研究毀於一旦!

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack 1 #3
programme.desc: Agonize over a lost Stork pack puppy, and tussle with Manzi pups who are sorting their place in the hierarchy, figuring out noisy-neighbor friends and foes. Hop on a search mission with Julz for the missing Kakuli pack in the desolate Badlands.

programme.title: 野狗: 與族群一起奔跑 #3
programme.desc: 為一隻丟失的鸛群幼崽苦惱,與正在等級戰鬥的曼茲幼崽打成一片,了解吵鬧鄰居中的朋友和敵人。和朱爾茲一起在荒涼的不毛之地尋找失蹤的卡庫裡族群。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #1
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​探索由社區經營的瑞特提大象庇護所,在這裡,人類的代理媽媽們透過玩耍教導小象如何在野外生存,並細心地照顧與陪伴牠們成長。與那隻失去象鼻的小象隆烏洛建立情感連結,同時了解為什麼六歲的小象凱勒勒那場神祕的疾病,可能會讓牠的重返野外之路被迫延遲。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #2
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #2
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​在道別的傷痛與對未來的希望之間尋求平衡,因為這一代被救援的大象,終於迎來了重返自由的時刻。歡迎瑞特提大家庭的新成員: 一頭從水坑中被救出的象寶寶,以及一匹名叫奇希瑪的斑馬,牠曾因創傷而驚恐不安。

programme.title: Airborne 1 #4
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

programme.title: 空中翱翔 #4
programme.desc: 看動物穿越天空展開非凡的旅程。穿梭在木製迷宮中的迅捷蒼鷹,加入沙雞艱辛遠行到遙遠水源的跋涉,並觀賞一群椋鳥形成的壯觀集體盤旋,迷惑牠們的天敵。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 散落在不同海洋上的島嶼,其多樣性超乎想像;演化亦在你眼前發生。從加拉帕戈斯群島走到南極洲,看看海獅、雀鳥、蟋蟀、猴子和其他野生動物,如何以驚人的適應力來應對氣候變化問題。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 從撒哈拉到荒野,於極端環境中學習動物如何適應急速變化的氣候並掙扎求存。與黑猩猩一起在洞穴中避難、看看駱駝以特別技巧飲用鹽水,並傾聽斑胸草雀為蛋寶寶由唱的歌,了解歌聲如何讓幼雛變得細小。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #4 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #4 [英/普]
programme.desc: 前往美國極北地帶,拜訪沿著水道生活的終極格鬥士。春回大地,看到融雪就知道格鬥隨時上演: 鷹與鷺的對決、熊族對陣,以及蜻蜓蛹與大型水蟲之間的決鬥。

programme.title: Survival of the Beast 1 #5 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Peek inside the secret world of the fearless, often misunderstood sloth bear. Travel to Sri Lanka with Max and discover how this fierce, shaggy animal fights off leopards and other deadly rivals, all while trying to secure enough protein to survive.

programme.title: 野獸絕地求生記 #5 [英/普]
programme.desc: 跟隨麥可斯探索斯里蘭卡,窺探懶熊常被誤解的神秘世界。見證這種看似人畜無害、毛髮蓬亂的動物,如何無畏地擊退豹子,並觀察牠們如何努力獲取所需的營養。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #1
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​探索由社區經營的瑞特提大象庇護所,在這裡,人類的代理媽媽們透過玩耍教導小象如何在野外生存,並細心地照顧與陪伴牠們成長。與那隻失去象鼻的小象隆烏洛建立情感連結,同時了解為什麼六歲的小象凱勒勒那場神祕的疾病,可能會讓牠的重返野外之路被迫延遲。

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #2
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​在道別的傷痛與對未來的希望之間尋求平衡,因為這一代被救援的大象,終於迎來了重返自由的時刻。歡迎瑞特提大家庭的新成員: 一頭從水坑中被救出的象寶寶,以及一匹名叫奇希瑪的斑馬,牠曾因創傷而驚恐不安。

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth 1 #6 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: 野外紀事 #6 [英/普]
programme.desc: 於11月見證大自然一些最不可思議的事,從聚在墨西哥森林中的數百萬隻君主斑蝶,到籠罩著杜拜市的濃霧,標誌著冬天的開始。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: Shadowlands 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: The south-eastern coast of New Zealand are some of the richest fishing grounds in the world – the place for young marine animals to transition from novices to independent adults. Young whales, dolphins and seals learn to hunt, learn the rules of society,

programme.title: 南荒之地 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 新西蘭東南岸是世上最富饒的漁場之一,也是海洋動物嬰孩從新丁長大成人之地。年輕的鯨魚、海豚和海豹學習捕獵;學習社會規則,甚至開始自己的冒險。

programme.title: Airborne 1 #4
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #4 [英/普]
programme.desc: 前往美國極北地帶,拜訪沿著水道生活的終極格鬥士。春回大地,看到融雪就知道格鬥隨時上演: 鷹與鷺的對決、熊族對陣,以及蜻蜓蛹與大型水蟲之間的決鬥。

programme.title: Survival of the Beast 1 #5 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Peek inside the secret world of the fearless, often misunderstood sloth bear. Travel to Sri Lanka with Max and discover how this fierce, shaggy animal fights off leopards and other deadly rivals, all while trying to secure enough protein to survive.

programme.title: 野獸絕地求生記 #5 [英/普]
programme.desc: 跟隨麥可斯探索斯里蘭卡,窺探懶熊常被誤解的神秘世界。見證這種看似人畜無害、毛髮蓬亂的動物,如何無畏地擊退豹子,並觀察牠們如何努力獲取所需的營養。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #1
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​探索由社區經營的瑞特提大象庇護所,在這裡,人類的代理媽媽們透過玩耍教導小象如何在野外生存,並細心地照顧與陪伴牠們成長。與那隻失去象鼻的小象隆烏洛建立情感連結,同時了解為什麼六歲的小象凱勒勒那場神祕的疾病,可能會讓牠的重返野外之路被迫延遲。

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: the Orphans of Reteti 1 #2
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.title: 成為大象: 瑞提提的孤兒們 #2
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​在道別的傷痛與對未來的希望之間尋求平衡,因為這一代被救援的大象,終於迎來了重返自由的時刻。歡迎瑞特提大家庭的新成員: 一頭從水坑中被救出的象寶寶,以及一匹名叫奇希瑪的斑馬,牠曾因創傷而驚恐不安。

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth 1 #6 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: 野外紀事 #6 [英/普]
programme.desc: 於11月見證大自然一些最不可思議的事,從聚在墨西哥森林中的數百萬隻君主斑蝶,到籠罩著杜拜市的濃霧,標誌著冬天的開始。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 散落在不同海洋上的島嶼,其多樣性超乎想像;演化亦在你眼前發生。從加拉帕戈斯群島走到南極洲,看看海獅、雀鳥、蟋蟀、猴子和其他野生動物,如何以驚人的適應力來應對氣候變化問題。

programme.title: Evolution Earth 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: 地球演化實錄 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 從撒哈拉到荒野,於極端環境中學習動物如何適應急速變化的氣候並掙扎求存。與黑猩猩一起在洞穴中避難、看看駱駝以特別技巧飲用鹽水,並傾聽斑胸草雀為蛋寶寶由唱的歌,了解歌聲如何讓幼雛變得細小。

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack 1 #4
programme.desc: Dodge a leopard with the Manzi dogs while they treat themselves to a stolen feast. No such luck for the Kakuli pack on the hunt, as they’re foiled by a brave puku antelope. Find the stork pack, and retreat from charging elephants with Jules and Simon.

programme.title: 野狗: 與族群一起奔跑 #4
programme.desc: 在享受偷來的盛宴時,躲避了一隻獵豹和曼茲狗群。但卡庫裡族群在狩獵中就沒這麼幸運了,因為它們被一隻勇敢的普庫羚羊挫敗了。找到鸛群,和朱爾斯和西蒙一起逃避衝鋒中的大象。

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands 1 #1 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Endure winter and early spring on the west coast, where animals eke out a chilly existence. Watch red deer battle on windswept Inishvickillane, welcome seal pups amid howling storms on the Inishkea islands, and view the return of the basking sharks.

programme.title: 愛爾蘭: 野性島嶼 #1 [英/普]
programme.desc: 見證棲身於西海岸的不同物種,如何忍受嚴冬並迎接初春的來臨。親眼目睹在強風下的紅鹿激戰,在風聲呼嘯的暴風雨中歡迎海豹寶寶來臨,以及象鯊群的回歸。

programme.title: Wild Latin America 1 #1
programme.desc: Follow the first months of a newborn humpback whale’s life in the waters off the Pacific Coast of Columbia. See how his mother nurtures him through sickness, supports his body, protects him under attack, and prepares him for an epic journey.

programme.title: 拉丁美生态奥秘 #1
programme.desc: 哥倫比亞海岸附近,新生的座頭鯨吸了牠的第一口氣。牠身長16呎,是一個巨人,但未來的挑戰跟牠一樣巨大。在進行地球上最長的遷徙之一前,牠必須快點長大。

programme.title: Wild Latin America 1 #2
programme.desc: Travel deep into the Columbian rainforest, where it’s mating season for one of the most clever monkey species in the world. Witness the most important time of year for male squirrel monkeys that have been bulking up to impress females for months.

programme.title: 拉丁美生态奥秘 #2
programme.desc: 隨著松鼠猴的繁殖季節臨近,女強人艾巴必須帶領牠的團伙尋找食物,但男領袖撒母耳能奪得芳心嗎?年輕的沙奇拿迷了路,而敵人逐漸緊逼,局勢開始緊張。

programme.title: Wild Latin America 1 #3
programme.desc: Get to know South America’s only bear species. Witness the shy and charismatic spectacled bear play, forage, and look for mates at the secluded Chaparri Ecological Reserve in Northern Peru.

programme.title: 拉丁美生态奥秘 #3
programme.desc: 在秘魯的山脈,一小群眼鏡熊為生存而戰。孤兒阿馬遜娜必須學會獨立。老去的東哥沒時間找到配偶,很難才能俘虜理想對象曹莉達。

programme.title: Supersenses 1 #1 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Vision – it’s how ninety-five percent of animals interpret the world. Every species on Earth is a chapter in the fascinating story of sight. This episode follows that story from blurry beginnigs to mind-blowing hexnocular vision.

programme.title: 動物超感官 第一季 #1 [英/普]
programme.desc: 視野對生存尤關重要。這是百分之九十五的動物瞭解世界的方法。眼睛是如此重要,從難以置信地簡單到令人費解地複雜,它們已經獨立地進化了近百次。

programme.title: Supersenses 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: See the animals that push the limits of physics, chemistry and engineering to pull off feats that humans can only dream of, and find out how evolution granted them with such amazing abilities. Sometimes it takes a super-power just to survive.

programme.title: 動物超感官 第一季 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 看看那些突破物理、化學和工程極限的動物,牠們實現人類夢想中的能力,並找出進化如何賦予牠們如此驚人的能力。有時生存只能依靠超能力。

programme.title: Supersenses 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Dive into a dazzling world beyond human perception, where animals use their super senses to detect light we can’t see, sound we can’t hear and even stranger forces we can’t begin to detect.

programme.title: 動物超感官 第一季 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 潛入人類感知以外令人眼花繚亂的世界,動物利用牠們的超感官來感測我們看不到的光、聽不到的聲音,甚至是我們無法察覺的陌生力量。

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: 啄木鳥: 樹洞故事
programme.desc: 伴隨著一個獨特的鳥類家族的穩定鼓點行進。了解為何世界上從大到小的239種啄木鳥都是自然界最好的伐木工;探索牠們的飛行、攀爬和呼叫技能;進入牠們的秘密巢穴一探究竟。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #1 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #1 [英/普]
programme.desc: 見證鬥士們如何在非洲大草原的旱季中爭奪水源和其他珍貴資源。親眼目擊獅子和大象為爭奪地盤的激烈爭鬥、螞蟻襲擊白蟻丘、以及蜜獾與毒蛇聯袂上演的危險探戈。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #2 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Go up against Australia’s wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals. Learn if these weapons, such as the kangaroo’s deadly boxing moves and the redback spider’s precision-engineered traps, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #2 [英/普]
programme.desc: 拜訪澳洲最狡猾的鬥士和他們驚人的武器庫。從袋鼠的致命拳擊和紅背蜘蛛精密設計的陷阱,暸解他們如何運用這些必殺技擊退敵人,同時應對氣候變化的侵害。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #3 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Cheer as young gladiators earn their stripes in the dense tropical forests of the Americas. Stand back as a poison dart frog launches a toxic barrage, observe a jaguar-caiman turf war, and see a hungry coati cross paths with a defensive tarantula.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #3 [英/普]
programme.desc: 齊來為年輕的格鬥士們鼓掌,並親眼見證他們在美洲茂密的熱帶森林中奮力拼搏!然後退後一步,觀察一隻毒箭蛙發動絕活攻勢、還有美洲豹和凱門鱷爭奪地盤,以及見證一隻飢餓的長鼻狸與猛蜘蛛的邂逅。

programme.title: Gladiators 1 #4 [Eng/Man]
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: 動物格鬥士 #4 [英/普]
programme.desc: 前往美國極北地帶,拜訪沿著水道生活的終極格鬥士。春回大地,看到融雪就知道格鬥隨時上演: 鷹與鷺的對決、熊族對陣,以及蜻蜓蛹與大型水蟲之間的決鬥。

programme.title: Snow Leopards with Dan ONeill 1 #1
programme.desc: Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded. Watch him battle hostile landscapes and uncertainty as he sheds light on the challenges that The Dude and other snow leopards face.

programme.title: 雪豹獵奇 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​與丹一同踏上旅程,穿越嚴酷無情的蒙古荒野,只為尋找那隻史上有紀錄以來體型最大的雪豹: 「老兄」(The Dude)。目睹他如何在充滿敵意、危機四伏的地形與環境中奮力前行,並在未知與不確定中披荊斬棘,同時揭示「老兄」以及其他雪豹在生存上所面臨的艱難挑戰與嚴峻現實。

programme.title: Snow Leopards with Dan ONeill 1 #2
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: 雪豹獵奇 #2
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​跟隨丹與他的團隊,一同在「老兄」的領地中嗅探、追蹤,他們懷疑雌性雪豹在雪豹族群中的角色,可能遠比先前想像的更加關鍵、更具影響力。當丹意外發現一群雪豹聚集的反常現象時,對雪豹行為的既有研究與認知也因此受到衝擊與挑戰。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #1
programme.desc: Head out into the Pantanal with Lizzie and the Onçafari team on the hunt for a missing dominant male jaguar. Monitor the battle between young hopefuls, like outsider Badalo, who want to usurp his power and win over Fera and the other local females.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #1
programme.desc: 跟隨麗茲·戴利及其團隊前往潘塔納爾,追尋一隻失蹤的雄性美洲豹領袖,並親眼目睹年輕挑戰者之間的戰鬥。見證局外人巴達洛如何篡奪權力,並贏得菲拉和其他雌性美洲豹的歡心。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #2
programme.desc: Get to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner. Then learn why Ferinha, another local female, struggles with motherhood as more males move in and threaten the youngsters.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #2
programme.desc: 一起拜會潘塔納爾美洲豹族群的女王菲拉,從旁觀察她教導淘氣的幼寶寶辛巴如何爬樹和捕獵。然後看看另一隻雌豹菲琳娜如何面對更多當地雄豹入侵領土,並威脅幼寶寶的存活。面對考驗,她必須為母職掙扎堅持。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #3
programme.desc: Rejoin the team for some post-rainy-season drama as they search for Ferinha, Fera, and Badalo, whose tracking collars are missing. Meet a new biologist who helps Lizzie recollar the jaguars, adding a high-tech device that will record even more data.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #3
programme.desc: 跟隨科學家團隊在雨季過後重新走入美洲豹領地,進行一次具規模的搜索,以尋找菲琳娜、菲拉和巴達洛,因為他們的追蹤項圈已經丟失。迎接一位生物學家加入團隊,在他的協助下,麗茲·戴利為美洲豹重新安裝追蹤項圈,並添置高科技設備以記錄更多數據。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #4
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #4
programme.desc: 經歷風暴、洪水和停電,莉茲和獸醫霍亞雷斯仍奮力為更多美洲豹戴上項圈,情勢相當緊張。一起尋找巴達洛的下落,並嘗試在追蹤標籤掉落之前找到他,以及拜訪一隻團隊渴望研究的新䧳豹。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #5
programme.desc: Watch the Onçafari team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, and take a peek at Aurora’s cub, Apolo. Continue to track Badalo, who has moved deeper into the flooded forest, where he puts Lizzie’s game-changing research in jeopardy.

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #5
programme.desc: 見證奧瑪法瑞團隊為新認識的䧳豹阿羅艾拉戴上項圈,並一瞥她的豹寶寶阿波羅。繼續追查巴達洛的落下,他似乎已深入森林;他的失蹤可能讓莉茲的突破性研究毀於一旦!

programme.title: Snow Leopards with Dan ONeill 1 #1
programme.desc: Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded. Watch him battle hostile landscapes and uncertainty as he sheds light on the challenges that The Dude and other snow leopards face.

programme.title: 雪豹獵奇 #1
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​與丹一同踏上旅程,穿越嚴酷無情的蒙古荒野,只為尋找那隻史上有紀錄以來體型最大的雪豹: 「老兄」(The Dude)。目睹他如何在充滿敵意、危機四伏的地形與環境中奮力前行,並在未知與不確定中披荊斬棘,同時揭示「老兄」以及其他雪豹在生存上所面臨的艱難挑戰與嚴峻現實。

programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: 雪豹獵奇 #2
programme.desc: ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​跟隨丹與他的團隊,一同在「老兄」的領地中嗅探、追蹤,他們懷疑雌性雪豹在雪豹族群中的角色,可能遠比先前想像的更加關鍵、更具影響力。當丹意外發現一群雪豹聚集的反常現象時,對雪豹行為的既有研究與認知也因此受到衝擊與挑戰。

programme.desc: 跟隨科學家團隊在雨季過後重新走入美洲豹領地,進行一次具規模的搜索,以尋找菲琳娜、菲拉和巴達洛,因為他們的追蹤項圈已經丟失。迎接一位生物學家加入團隊,在他的協助下,麗茲·戴利為美洲豹重新安裝追蹤項圈,並添置高科技設備以記錄更多數據。

programme.title: Jaguar Journals 1 #4

programme.title: 美洲豹日誌 #4

programme.title: 大逃殺[日]
programme.desc: BR法生存遊戲規則:從全國共四萬三千班中學三年級學生當中,隨機抽選一班,參加一場互相殘殺的遊戲,直到只剩一人生還為止,否則,全部格殺勿論...被抽選中的這個班,會被送到無人小島進行遊戲.原本一群開心地乘坐遊覽車預定參加畢業旅行的城岩中學三年B班學生,卻在路途中遭受大東亞共和國軍政府的挾持,軍人們將全體學生帶往荒無人煙的沖木島上.甦醒後,他們發現脖子上被扣上特製頸環,並身處於一間凌亂的教室中,...

programme.title: In The Lap Of God[Can/Man]
programme.desc: To escape from being arrested, two pick-pockets put a diamond necklace in Mays handbag.May is in need of a large sum to save her boyfriend who has been caught in Burma, so she takes the necklace t...

programme.title: 蠻荒的童話[粵/普]
programme.desc: May目睹一宗偷竊案件時,被扒手將一條鑽石鍊放進手袋中,剛巧男友在緬甸被擄,要May三天內以廿萬美金贖回,May遂挺而走險,帶著賊贓到仰光去.另方面,鑽石失主迫扒手首領Roy五天內尋回鑽石,Roy與May因而共同展開仰光之旅...

programme.title: Racing Spotlight
programme.desc: Racing Spotlight

programme.title: 排位焦點
programme.desc: 從不同賽馬數據, 尋找賽事重心; 並會分析馬房形勢, 看清哪個馬房, 佈下強陣, 準備大舉出撃的「進擊馬房」; 以及哪些騎師手上坐騎, 具備實力成就佳績的「強駒在手」, 亦會為大家介紹初出馬。

programme.title: 睇排位 做功課
programme.desc: 與觀眾一同為賽日做準備, 看清排位形勢、人馬配搭、馬匹配備變動, 並同時參考馬匹過去陣上走勢或近期試閘表現, 以掌握馬匹實力、了解賽事, 助計算馬匹的勝算機會。
